3190440.name: Gnomecart Havoc
3190440.description:
Story

Once upon a time in a nameless fantasy world there was a colony of gnomes living and working in a mine. On one day the miners accidentaly dug too deep, unleashing an evil power from an unknown world with full of monsters.

Gameplay

In each run players control their chosen leader gnome from room to room, destroying every enemy they encounter.

Players can find crewmates or crystals during their journey. Crewmates follow the player and fight alongside with their leader, while crystals upgrade either the player or the crewmates.

As the player progresses through the levels, they will encounter increasing number of enemies and face bosses and special enemies.
